hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); for pat in service_account.json secrets.toml .env vr_oauth_token.json; do case "$FILE" in *"$pat"*) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify $FILE (protected file: $pat)" >&2; exit 2;; esac; done; exit 0
